name: Zammad — tickets import
description: Imports tickets from Zammad (the popular open-source help-desk / ticketing system) via the REST API into XORCISM as security alerts (XINCIDENT.ALERT). Each Zammad ticket becomes an ALERT (idempotent by its number); priority maps to severity, state to status, owner is carried over. Config (worker environment variables): ZAMMAD_URL (e.g. https://support.acme.io), ZAMMAD_TOKEN (HTTP token access). Offline: pass `file` = a /api/v1/tickets export JSON, or run with no config for the bundled sample.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.help: Maximum number of tickets to import

parameters.name: group
parameters.help: Optional Zammad group name to filter on (e.g. 'Security')

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline: a saved /api/v1/tickets export JSON to parse instead of the live API
